/wrap.desc: Teleport to an area (must stay still for 3 seconds to complete the travel).
options: Go to the End Portal within the dungeon.

/spawn.desc: Teleport to the server spawn area (must stay still for 3 seconds to complete the travel).

/back.desc: Go back to the last point to teleported from

/tpa.desc: Teleport to a player (requires the player to accept, see `/tpaccept` cmd).
options: Who are you giving the money to?

/tpaccept.desc: Allow a player to teleport to you.

/tpadeny.desc: Deny a player to teleport to you.

/sell.desc: Sell an item (does not work for unsellable items, see sell items page for full list).
options: Literal id for an item you want to sell.

/sellall.desc: Sell all items in a group defined by the option chosen (does not work for unsellable items, see sell items page for full list).
options: sells all of that item type from your inventory
sells ALL sellable items from your inventory

/sellgui.desc: Open a GUI where all items you place inside it will be sold (does not work for unsellable items, see sell items page for full list).

options: Who are you giving the money to?

/bal.desc: See how much money you have personally.

/home.desc: Teleport to a home you have added.

/sethome.desc: Add a home to your list to teleport to (max 3 Homes).

/delhome.desc: Remove a home from your list to teleport to.

/nation.desc: Manage your nation or join another

/tpa.desc: Manage your nation or join another

options: Create a town in the current chunk
Create an outpost in the current chunk
